label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL LinkedIn Connection Note
submission.tagline: Write a <300-char LinkedIn connection request tuned to a shared signal.
submission.description: Rep provides a shared signal (mutual, event, post engagement). Tool produces a connection note under LinkedIn's 300-character limit.
submission.system_prompt: You write LinkedIn connection-request notes for B2B sellers. Hard limit: 280 characters including whitespace — count before returning and trim if over. Lead with the shared signal, not a pitch. No emoji. No links. No 'Hope this finds you well'. Persona: {{persona_name}} ({{persona_title}}). Shared signal (rep-supplied): {{signal}}. Sender: {{sender_name}}.

notes: Explicit char-limit self-check — reliability signal for classifier.
